summary: In a brief post, Ilya Sutskever praises Anthropic and OpenAI for taking a firm, unified stance on an unspecified issue. He emphasizes the necessity for AI leaders and fierce competitors to put aside their differences to navigate increasingly challenging situations in the future.

principles.statement: Fierce competitors in the AI industry must be willing to put their differences aside during critical challenges.
principles.rationale: The future will bring increasingly difficult situations that require unified leadership to navigate successfully.
principles.source_quote: In the future, there will be much more challenging situations of this nature, and it will be critical for the relevant leaders to rise up to the occasion, for fierce competitors to put their differences aside.

signature_quotes.text: In the future, there will be much more challenging situations of this nature, and it will be critical for the relevant leaders to rise up to the occasion, for fierce competitors to put their differences aside.
signature_quotes.context: Commenting on Anthropic and OpenAI taking a unified stance on a challenging issue.
